description.content:
The Torii API provides programmatic access to the Torii SaaS Management Platform. It allows you to manage apps, users, contracts, licenses, audit logs, and file uploads. The API closely follows REST semantics, uses JSON to encode objects, and relies on standard HTTP codes to signal operation outcomes. Torii APIs consist of both proprietary and SCIM 2.0 APIs.

Contact Support:
 Name: Torii
